prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: FLL-HALOXLEVEL-PARENT Product Type: AIMING_SCOPE_SIGHT Brand (from catalog): Flatline-Ops Existing Title: Flatline-Ops Halo-X Rigid Rifle Scope Bubble Level, Shooting Optics (30mm 34mm 35mm 36mm) Description: The new Halo-X is a long distance accuracy improvement tool that will help you level whatever you're aiming for. This shooting optics rifle scope bubble level was originally designed for Leupold's Mark 5HD enlisted optic programs, this unique and precision-engineered level is now available for every day use.

Made in the USA. Machined from ultra-strong 7075-T6 aircraft aluminum, this is our lightest and strongest scope mounted bubble level for rifles. Weighing less than half an ounce, and only 5/16" wide, it's our most minimal level for crowded scope tubes with extensive vegetation.

Bubble Level Quality Specifications:

Vial-Bridge dual vial connection points and suspended bubble level with the reflective platform, allow maximum light refraction for enhanced fluid illumination and sight acquisition in all outdoor and harsh conditions
Jaw bone barrel hinge point for easy installation
Single top strap screw for ease of installation and access
Ultra-light, high strength 7075-T6 aircraft aluminum
Mil-Spec Type III hard anodizing for durability
Built for left or right-handed shooters

PATENT-PENDING Search Terms: rifle scope bubble level firearms accessories scopes thermal spotting reticle rifle sling bubble accuracy picatinny accurate first level anti cant leveling jig Features: - PRECISION ENGINEERED SCOPE BUBBLE LEVEL: Will fit either right hand shooters or left handed shooters; installs easily with all mounting hardware included - HIGH VISIBILITY ANTI CANT: Dual vial connection points and suspended bubble level with the reflective platform, allows maximum light refraction for enhanced fluid illuminated and sight acquisition. Jaw Bone barrel hinge point for easy installation. - SOLID, DURABLE CONSTRUCTION: Each of the bubble level for rifle scopes is machined from advanced 6061-T6 aircraft aluminum and then black hard anodized to protect it from the extremes of the outdoors - FEATHER LIGHT: Weighing less than half an ounce and only 5/16" wide, this is most minimal rifle bubble level for crowded scope tubes with extensive vegetation - MADE IN THE USA: Bubble level fits 30mm, 34mm, 35mm, 36mm rifle scopes; Material: Milspec Finish: Black Hard Anodized; Weight: .475oz; Width: 5/16" (.3125 inch) === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Flatline-Ops Halo-X Rifle Scope Bubble Level

anthropic.title_differentiation: Anti-Cant Leveling, Fits 30Mm-36mm Scopes, Made In USA, Ultra-Light 7075-T6 Aircraft Aluminum, Left And Right Hand

openai.title_differentiation: Anti Cant Precision Level, 7075-T6 Aircraft Aluminum, Ultra-Light 516" Wide, Left Or Right Hand, Made In US
